data.body: STATE: OPEN, NOT built — ESCALATED to a stronger model. Trusted rebar-mcp remote-execution + AWS IaC. Plan-review did NOT converge over 5 rounds: each round surfaced real integration tensions (verdict-vocab mismatch PASS/FAIL vs PASS/BLOCK/INDETERMINATE across the two gates; review_plan already self-signs HMAC -> double-signing; AWS Lambda 15-min timeout vs multi-minute gate runs -> Fargate+async like review_bot; Secrets-Manager->0600-tempfile ssh-keygen; passphrase-free key; server-owned env_id). CORRECTION: AWS deploy IS in scope (authenticated AWS CLI available) — the deploy AC should be a real deploy+authenticated-round-trip, not operator-attested. Design is coupled to 8f1d (producer-key seam) and 4214's era-anchor — resolve together. Latest description carries the round-4 spec; see escalation brief in transcript.
